creator: jonc@chen.org.nz
text:
(In reply to Sean Champ from comment #1)

Sorry, I've been a bit laggard with regards to the 4.25 release - due to "Real Life". I'll be attempting the update to 4.25 on this coming weekend.
I may have to push back on this PR, as the real work on the port is actually done on https://github.com/daemonblade/freebsd-eclipse, which includes the steps required to build the offline maven-repo as well.
